zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Lewknor於大約1433年出生在英國英格蘭肯特波斯特林時，他的父親Roger Lewknor25歲，母親Alianor Camoys27歲。他於1445年與Malyne在英國英格蘭肯特洛利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1476年享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Lewknor was born about 1433, in Postling, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Lewknor, was 25 and his mother, Alianor Camoys, was 27. He married Malyne in 1445, in Throwley, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1476, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Lewknor est né environ 1433, à Postling, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Lewknor, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alianor Camoys, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Malyne en 1445, à Throwley, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1476, à l’âge de 45 ans.

Er hat 1445 in Throwley, Kent, England, United Kingdom Malyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1476 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

ko.Barcombe Cross, East Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 이스트 수세스 바코브 크로스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Lewknor(이)가 대략 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 포스틀링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Lewknor(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianor Camoys(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스로우리에서 Malyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1476년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Malyne в 1445 г. в местности троули, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1476 г. в возрасте 45 лет.
